text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The Hopeful Stakes is one of the major races for
determining who will become the junior year
champion.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I will use this G1 race to rise to even greater
heights.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You know what that means, right, Trainer?
choice_data_list: This is a checkpoint of sorts.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Correct. In other words, I will put on my best and
most beautiful display yet.
